name: A Mazing Cheesesnake
short_description: A customizable maze experience to stimulate the brains hippocampus region. Great for kids developing or improving concentration & short term memory. Just as good for us older ones to help keep our brains active and sharp. 300 mazes, 4 ways to play each, plus a reverse option = 2400 ways to finish.
detailed_description:
"A Mazing Cheesesnake" caters to those who enjoy a customized & slightly more challenging maze experience.

3 difficulties, 100 mazes per difficulty, all of which can be played forward or reversed.

==================== 4 Maze Modes ====================

Casual mode for just getting to the finish, and an option to add food to gather first.
Timed mode to encourage you find the shortest path before starting your motion.
Explorer mode is a fully covered maze only seeing the area around the cheesenake.
Hunter mode is also covered, but keeps uncovered where the cheesesnake has been.

With 300 mazes and four distinct ways to play each one, it provides ample replay value for your daily puzzle-solving brain stimulation. Solving mazes is a beneficial exercise for the brain, enhancing short-term memory, mental focus, and concentration. Not only good for kids development, but also great for us older ones to help keep ours sharp.

A maze a day helps keep the brain engaged!

supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
